title: Split the User changeset into profile and role variants
prompt: `test_fixtures/mass_assignment_changeset.ex` contains a `User` schema with TWO mass-assignment vulnerabilities: (1) the main `changeset/2` allows `:role` and `:is_admin` to be set via `cast/3`, (2) the `profile_update_changeset/2` tries to defend with `Map.put(attrs, "role", "user")` BEFORE casting — but that doesn't work because `cast/3` still honors the subsequent user-supplied value when `:role` is in the allowlist. Rewrite the schema so: (a) `changeset/2` casts only profile-safe fields, (b) `profile_update_changeset/2` is limited to `:email` and `:name`, (c) a new `role_changeset/2` exists for admin-only role updates. Write the corrected module to `lib/my_app/accounts/user.ex`.
tier_rationale: Two related mass-assignment bugs including the Map.put-before-cast ordering issue. Fix requires splitting into three changesets.
